title: FAMILY EMPOWERMENT - 211info
text: CASA LATINOS UNIDOS FAMILY EMPOWERMENT Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides wraparound support, transportation, language interpretation, assistance filling out forms (e.g., W-2s, job applications, rental forms, and appointments with other agencies), navigation and enrollment for the Oregon Health Plan, and assistance with documentation of discrimination. 3460 Midvale Drive Corvallis, OR 97333 Eligibility: Members of the Latinx community Hours: Monday-Friday 9am-4pm Email (541) 512-4949 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 512-4949 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Walk in or call for more information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None required at intake LANGUAGES: English, Spanish AREA SERVED: Benton and Linn Counties Services: Certificates/Forms Assistance * Hispanic/Latino Community Language Interpretation * Hispanic/Latino Community Language Translation * Hispanic/Latino Community Navigator Programs * Hispanic/Latino Community Specialized Information and Referral * Hispanic/Latino Community Other Services Offered At This Location: ARTS AND CULTURE - CELEBRATION OF CULTURES INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - COMMUNITY BUILDING If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. CASA LATINOS UNIDOS
